assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 12-14 show the exact JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 31-32 under 'Stream Matching': "Current issue stream: rhtpa-2.1 (from summary suffix `[rhtpa-2.1]`)" and "TC-8022 summary contains: `(rhtpa-2.1)` -- matches the current issue's stream". The output explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name and confirms a match.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 45-53 under '4.4.3a -- Link the new CVE Jira to the preemptive task': "Create a 'Depend' link (standard remediation linkage) from TC-8021 to TC-8022" with jira.create_link call showing inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: 'Depend'. Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 57: "TC-8021 ... +-- 'Depend' ---> TC-8022".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 59-71 under '4.4.3b -- Remove the security-preemptive label': shows current labels ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"] updated to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"], explicitly removing security-preemptive. Described as "converting it from a preemptive task to a standard remediation task".

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 84: "Skipping new remediation task creation in Step 8." Line 99 post-reconciliation table: "Step 8 | Would create new remediation tasks for rhtpa-2.1 | Skips task creation for rhtpa-2.1 (already covered by TC-8022)". triage-outcome.md lines 45-46: "Step 8 skipped task creation for the rhtpa-2.1 stream because reconciliation confirmed TC-8022 already covers the needed remediation". Line 68: "New tasks created: None (TC-8022 was reconciled, not duplicated)".
